name: German Peppered Beef Soup
recipeInstructions:
First, cut the meat into 1 inch chunks, leaving the pepper intact. Sear by your favorite method - I prefer sesame oil in a wok.
Crock Pot Method: Chop all ingredients into 1 inch pieces and place in pot. Cover with water plus 1 inch for the pan (200°F). Cook on medium for 4 hours, stirring every 2 hours. Then reduce to low and cook covered for an additional 6 hours.
Pan Method: Chop carrots, celery, and meat into 1 inch pieces. Place in a pan and cook at medium-low (150-160°F) for 1 hour. Add the remaining ingredients and continue cooking for another hour.
Refrigerate for at least 6 hours before serving.
